df84ff5f-ef19-48d2-9fe4-399094462b73.content: I'm sorry, but this question does not appear to be covered by the uploaded PDF(s). I can only answer questions based on the content of the documents you have provided. Please ask something that is addressed within those documents.
what is written in the pdf

The PDF contains an assignment that instructs the user to create a symbolic link to the "important_data.txt" file located in the root directory [Page 3 — Graded Lab Assignment-Modules 1-4.pdf]. It also asks to check the permissions and inode number of this symbolic link [Page 3 — Graded Lab Assignment-Modules 1-4.pdf]. 

[Sources: Page 3 — Graded Lab Assignment-Modules 1-4.pdf]
